productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Light Winter Blue Tops
description: CompositionNavy blue and blue striped blouson top made of 82% viscose and 18% polyester, has a bateau cowl neckline and long sleeves FittingRegularWash careMachine wash in 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeCool ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryPerfect on style and great in comfort, this navy blue and melange blue striped blouson top from united colors of benetton makes for a great casual wear.
